text:
Tom woke up. Something felt wrong. He looked towards his ceiling. Everything appeared normal… sort of. There was something wrong with his hands.

He got out of bed slowly and hesitated. What mischief did strange hands want him to accomplish?

Just then there was a loud scratching behind his sofa. Perhaps his head?!

As he climbed onto the sofa an arm twisted his head.

“Goodness,” said an owl. “That does look like something I’d enjoy.”

Tom tried screaming. Nothing happened.

“What do you want?”

“A friendly owl. Could use a wee bit o’ feather.

“Well…”

“Just don’y bleedin’.”

Every night thereafter, owl stole his hat… or perhaps his hat just conveniently rooksched right?

Everytime? Perhaps there wasns.

Tom became owl’s favourite. All things feathers.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
